title: Compare all the players who have played DPS across all available runs. Use only metrics from time logged on Berserker, Amalgam and Tempest. Compare only players who are members of FAFO guild. Prioritize Downs Contribution > Damage to Downs > Damage per second. Player downs and deaths count as minimum negative. Minimum Sample of 2 runs per player. Created a table with weighted results

turns.userText: Compare all the players who have played DPS across all available runs. Use only metrics from time logged on Berserker, Amalgam and Tempest. Compare only players who are members of FAFO guild. Prioritize Downs Contribution > Damage to Downs > Damage per second. Player downs and deaths count as minimum negative. Minimum Sample of 2 runs per player. Created a table with weighted results
turns.agentText:
I'll pull the FAFO guild roster and all AxiBridge player stats in parallel, then cross-reference.

Good — FAFO guild ID confirmed. Now let me pull the full player stats with profession breakdown and the FAFO member roster simultaneously.

Now I need to pull the three key metric sections and full player stats for qualifying FAFO accounts.

The sections defaulted to the latest run only, and down contribution was all zeros there. I need to aggregate across all runs — let me check the full run list and then query the summaries.

Now I'll query all 29 run summaries with a jq aggregate to get per-player down contribution filtered to Berserker, Amalgam, and Tempest.

The field names are confirmed: `downsCaused`, `downContribution`, `damage`, `combatTimeMs`, `downs`, `deaths`. Now I'll run the full aggregate across all 29 runs.

All data gathered. Now I have everything to cross-reference FAFO roster, filter to qualifying players, and build the weighted table. Let me compile.

---

**DraGonfly.9317 leads all FAFO DPS players on Berserker/Amalgam/Tempest with a weighted score of 91.6 — the only player topping all three positive metrics simultaneously.** Here is the full cross-run weighted comparison for every FAFO member with ≥2 spec runs on Berserker, Amalgam, or Tempest, across all 29 available runs (2026-04-24 → 2026-06-17).

---

## Scoring Formula

All metrics are computed from combat time logged **exclusively on Berserker / Amalgam / Tempest** across all runs.

| Component | Weight | Direction |
|---|---|---|
| Downs Caused / hr | 0–50 pts | ↑ higher = better |
| Dmg to Downs / hr | 0–30 pts | ↑ higher = better |
| DPS (dmg per sec) | 0–20 pts | ↑ higher = better |
| Deaths / hr | 0 to −10 pts | ↓ higher rate = more penalty |
| Downs Taken / hr | 0 to −5 pts | ↓ higher rate = more penalty |

Min-max normalized across all qualifying players. Possible range: −15 → 100.

---

## FAFO DPS Comparison — Berserker / Amalgam / Tempest

| Rank | Account | Specs | Runs | DC/hr | Dmg↓/hr (K) | DPS | Deaths/hr | DT/hr | **Score** |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 🥇 1 | DraGonfly.9317 | Brs / Tmp | 13 | 103.1 | 2,297 | 3,750 | 7.0 | 12.5 | **91.6** |
| 🥈 2 | Mes.1906 | Amg / Brs / Tmp | 6 | 76.9 | 2,287 | 4,084 | 7.4 | 10.2 | **77.1** |
| 🥉 3 | FatherHyperion.1047 | Brs / Tmp | 5 | 89.0 | 1,825 | 3,388 | 6.6 | 16.4 | **70.4** |
| 4 | Cavalier.4015 | Amg / Tmp | 3 ⚠️ | 77.3 | 2,131 | 3,488 | 7.5 | 10.0 | **69.9** |
| 5 | Elementalist.8092 | Tmp | 4 | 66.2 | 1,406 | 4,069 | 3.4 | 8.6 | **55.8** |
| 6 | Tysun.5092 | Amg / Brs / Tmp | 9 | 65.2 | 1,745 | 3,161 | 7.8 | 14.6 | **51.4** |
| 7 | Siren.9741 | Tmp | 5 | 62.2 | 1,386 | 2,918 | 5.6 | 8.6 | **42.9** |
| 8 | LightspeedJack.9473 | Tmp | 2 ⚠️ | 60.6 | 1,315 | 2,195 | 4.4 | 9.5 | **35.6** |
| 9 | woahs.1329 | Amg / Tmp | 8 | 59.4 | 1,407 | 2,478 | 9.0 | 17.6 | **34.8** |
| 10 | Voyl.5241 | Tmp | 4 | 64.6 | 1,237 | 2,826 | 11.7 | 34.6 | **33.5** |
| 11 | Edermask.4726 | Amg / Tmp | 10 | 58.7 | 1,055 | 2,699 | 5.3 | 11.8 | **32.3** |
| 12 | Morkai.7021 | Amg / Tmp | 27 | 55.9 | 1,344 | 2,429 | 8.4 | 14.0 | **31.9** |
| 13 | Missing.6032 | Amg / Tmp | 13 | 49.6 | 1,191 | 2,437 | 9.8 | 15.2 | **24.0** |
| 14 | Tensauce.2946 | Brs / Tmp | 4 | 53.2 | 1,210 | 1,868 | 17.2 | 28.6 | **16.1** |
| 15 | Aeri.4529 | Brs | 2 ⚠️ | 41.7 | 730 | 1,708 | 4.0 | 6.2 | **9.2** |
| 16 | hackdead.5910 | Tmp | 2 ⚠️ | 25.6 | 731 | 1,438 | 0.0 | 0.0 | **0.0** |

> **DC/hr** = enemy Downs Caused per combat hour · **Dmg↓/hr** = Damage to Downs per combat hour · **DT/hr** = own Downs Taken per combat hour · ⚠️ = minimum sample (2–3 spec runs), treat with caution

---

## Key Takeaways

**Top tier (70+):**
- **DraGonfly (91.6)** is in a class of their own — highest per-hour downs, highest damage-to-downs/hr, and second-highest DPS, all with only moderate death penalties. Best all-round DPS in the guild on target specs.
- **Mes (77.1)** is DraGonfly's closest rival: **highest DPS (4,084)** and nearly-identical DC/hr, but ~25% lower downs-caused/hr pushes them to 2nd. Only 6 spec runs — numbers could shift with more data.
- **FatherHyperion (70.4)** and **Cavalier (69.9)** are separated by just 0.5 points. FatherHyp has the 2nd-best DPH (89.0/hr) but carries the death-penalty from high Downs Taken/hr (16.4). Cavalier's numbers are elite across all three positive metrics on only 3 runs — small sample but no red flags.

**Mid tier (35–56):**
- **Elementalist (55.8)** — tied for the highest DPS in the group (4,069) and the **cleanest death rate (3.4/hr)**. Would rank higher with more spec runs and stronger primary downs numbers.
- **Tysun (51.4)** — most versatile (plays all three specs), solid volume (9 runs), good all-round output.
- **Siren (42.9)** — clean, consistent Tempest. Low death rate (5.6/hr), no red flags.
- **LightspeedJack (35.6)** — only 2 runs but holds up well on DPH and DC/hr.

**Penalty drag (below 35):**
- **woahs (34.8)** — drops from the mid-pack due to high deaths (9.0/hr) and the **worst Downs Taken/hr among mid-range players (17.6)**.
- **Voyl (33.5)** — similar DPH to the #7-8 group, but **max downs-taken penalty (34.6 DT/hr)** tanks the score. Survivability on Tempest is a clear issue.
- **Morkai (31.9)** — despite the largest spec-run volume in the group (27 runs, 1,238 total downs), per-hour efficiency trails most of the field. Volume is there; intensity is the gap.
- **Tensauce (16.1)** — **maximum death penalty (17.2 deaths/hr)** and near-max downs-taken penalty (28.6 DT/hr) wipe out otherwise decent DPH (53.2). Survivability needs serious work.

---

**Excluded FAFO members who just missed the cut:** pillo.9341 (1 Tempest run), pixelbox.4751 (1 Amalgam run), Cavalier and hackdead were borderline — included at ⚠️ minimum sample.
